title: Iswaran the Storyteller – Flashcard Concept Mastery
author: R.K. Laxman

questions.question: Who was Mahendra?
questions.correct_answer: A junior supervisor at a construction company
questions.explanation: Mahendra worked at various construction sites and frequently moved from place to place for his job.

questions.question: Who was Iswaran?
questions.explanation: Iswaran followed Mahendra wherever he was posted and cooked for him while also entertaining him with stories.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra’s job require him to move frequently?
questions.correct_answer: Because he had to supervise activities at different construction sites
questions.explanation: His company hired supervisors for projects like factories, bridges, and dams.

questions.question: What special talent did Iswaran have?
questions.explanation: Iswaran could turn ordinary incidents into exciting stories full of suspense and drama.

questions.question: What story did Iswaran narrate about the elephant?
questions.correct_answer: He claimed he stopped a mad elephant with a single blow
questions.explanation: Iswaran dramatically described how he struck the elephant on its toenail and brought it down.

questions.question: What explanation did Iswaran give for defeating the elephant?
questions.correct_answer: He said it was related to a Japanese martial art like karate or jujitsu
questions.explanation: Iswaran claimed the technique temporarily paralysed the elephant’s nervous system.

questions.question: What ghost story did Iswaran tell Mahendra?
questions.correct_answer: He described a female ghost holding a foetus that appeared on full-moon nights
questions.explanation: The frightening description gradually affected Mahendra’s imagination.

questions.question: How did Mahendra initially react to Iswaran’s ghost story?
questions.correct_answer: He dismissed it as imagination and nonsense
questions.explanation: Mahendra believed ghosts did not exist and scolded Iswaran for telling such stories.

questions.question: What happened to Mahendra on the full-moon night?
questions.correct_answer: He saw a dark cloudy figure near his window and became frightened
questions.explanation: Although he tried to reason it out, the sight terrified him.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra decide to leave the place?
questions.correct_answer: He became too frightened after the ghost incident
questions.explanation: The experience convinced him to leave the supposedly haunted area.

notes.title: Iswaran’s Storytelling Style
notes.content: Iswaran used dramatic expressions, suspense, and imagination to make even ordinary incidents sound thrilling.

notes.title: Effect of Stories on Mahendra
notes.content: Although Mahendra was rational, repeated ghost stories gradually influenced his mind and created fear.

facts.fact: Iswaran read popular Tamil thrillers that influenced his storytelling style.
Mahendra finally left the place because he feared it was haunted.
